column1: 帰りがけに、コンビニで夕食を買った。
column2: かえりがけに、こんびにでゆうしょくをかった。
column3: On the way home, I bought dinner at a convenience store.
column4: がけに (on the way to, as you go, while passing by)
column5: Verb[ます-stem] + がけに / Noun + がけに
column6: describes doing something incidentally while on the way to or from a main destination or activity
column8: がけに = incidental action on the way; ついでに = while at it (convenient secondary action); 途中で = on the way/partway; がてら = while going (purpose + incidental)
